title: pelargonium × compson
intro: Pelargonium × compson, also known as Geranium compson or Zandvliet, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Pelargonium × compson include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from anxiety and stress. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and oils, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and promote overall well-being.
